NODE 01 // PROJECTS

PROJECT_MATRIX

Here's a sample of projects with full attached documentation.

PLANT AUTO-MOISTURE UNIT

P1

LTspice // Circuit Analysis // Prototyping

Designed an analog circuit to water plants for a varying times depending on soilmoisture levels; this utilized AC->DC Converters, Filters, Timing Circuit, & more.

[[]]::0x3A::11

WARHAMMER VISOR LIGHTS

P2

C // RF Analysis // AutoDesk Fusion

Created transmitter receiver pair for helmet specifications under restrictionsconcering heat, power, weight, dimensions, and longevity while making a deliverableproduct.

[[]]::0x5F::12

NOSTLAGIA ULTRA [WIP]

P3

OS-Architecture // Firmware Optimization // Bash

Developing multi-console emulation and interface on Orange-Pi enabling switchingbetween OS based on current external switch state.
